title: Computer-Aided Detection System for Glaucoma Diagnosis
subtitle: Optic Nerve Head Analysis in Fundus Images
desc: A web-based medical analytics platform using a U-Net model trained on Indonesian clinical data to segment the optic disc and cup, compute Cup-to-Disc Ratios (CDR), and enable doctor-in-the-loop polygon annotations.

title: Palm Oil Fruit Counting
subtitle: Precision Agriculture Analytics
desc: An end-to-end AI annotation and counting server built with X-AnyLabeling and SAM-3 for precise agricultural metrics.

title: SessionIntent
subtitle: Linux Workspace Session Manager
desc: A Linux-centric productivity tool that automatically initializes specific application sets across multiple desktop workspaces.

title: Ingatini
subtitle: AI-Powered Document Chatbot
desc: An AI chatbot that ingests documents and provides accurate responses using LangChain, Pgvector, and FastAPI for seamless information retrieval.

title: PALIR
subtitle: Package Acquisition, Library Installation, and Reconstruction
desc: A desktop application for downloading and managing games without relying on third-party launchers, built using Python and Qt for a seamless user experience.
